deck1.label: The Future of Market Education
deck1.headline: Mastering the Internal Game
deck1.description: Experience the world's first AI-driven academy focused on the architecture of trading psychology. Beyond technical analysis—we rebuild your mind for the arena.

deck2.label: The Cost of Unpreparedness
deck2.headline: Don't Be Left In The Blur
deck2.description: The markets move faster than human emotion can process. While the world moves at breakneck speeds, most traders are lost in the velocity. Stop reacting. Start anticipating.

features.label: Engineered for Mastery
features.title: Proprietary Engine
features.description: We don't just teach trading; we provide the professional-grade toolset used by institutional players. Discover the full potential of our technological ecosystem.

01.title: Video Academy
01.desc: Access 260+ premium masterclasses in English, covering everything from foundation to institutional strategies.

02.title: Market Analysis AI
02.desc: Proprietary AI tools that process millions of data points to analyze high-probability market opportunities.

03.title: AI Mentor
03.desc: A personalized AI trainer available 24/7 to answer your complex questions and review your strategies.

04.title: Intelligent Diary
04.desc: An advanced trading journal that uses AI to analyze your performance and emotional patterns.

05.title: Risk Calculator
05.desc: Precision engineering for your positioning. Calculate risk-to-reward ratios and lot sizes instantly.

06.title: Social Wall
06.desc: A collaborative hub moderated by AI to ensure high-quality insights and authentic community sharing.

arena.title: The Psychology Arena
arena.description: Meet the 5 Simulated Gladiators testing current participants on "Risk & Greed". They push you to simulate the architecture of trading mastery.

punisher.name: Victor Hale
punisher.quote: "You're profitable today. So what? One reckless move and you're back to zero. Can you handle real heat?"
punisher.desc: A senior market broker who applies cold, calculated pressure. He doesn't shout — he waits. His silence is the loudest thing in the room. Expect outcome devaluation and skill questioning.

oracle.name: Marcus Stone
oracle.quote: "Emotions are noise. Your analysis says sell, your heart says hold. Who is winning right now?"
oracle.desc: A cold, dismissive market counterpart who has seen thousands of traders fail. He doesn't punch — he cuts. Specialist in dissecting your confidence down to its core elements.

steady.name: Nina Graves
steady.quote: "Breathe. Your heart rate just spiked. If you can't control your body, you can't control your trades."
steady.desc: A calm, fear-amplifying market voice that sounds unsettlingly reasonable. She amplifies uncertainty, raises plausible negative scenarios, and pressures your insecurities.

echo.name: Ryan Wolfe
echo.quote: "The market is mirroring your fear. You're hesitating. Are you a trader or a victim of the trend?"
echo.desc: A persuasive, opportunistic market voice that appears after a loss. He doesn't threaten — he offers relief. Expect normalization of impulsive behavior and a false sense of control.

nexus.name: Elias Moore
nexus.quote: "Congratulations on the win. Now, tell me why you're still in this trade. Greed is a silent killer."
nexus.desc: A calm, neutral presence who speaks very little. He doesn't pressure, seduce, or judge — he mirrors your own words back to you, exposing internal contradictions.

pricing.title: Select Your Trajectory
pricing.description: Whether you're laying the first stone or reaching for the cosmos, we have the path ready.

foundation.label: The Foundation Stone
foundation.title: Free Access
foundation.desc: The fundamental building block for every beginner.

social.title: Global Social Wall
social.description: Quality filter active. AI removes noise, leaving only institutional-grade insights.

alex.content: The Arena actually saved my account today. I heard Steady's voice in my head telling me to breathe before I almost FOMO'd into a bad entry.

elena.content: Just finished Video 142 on Institutional Liquidity. Everything finally clicked. The AI Analytics tools really highlighted the grab perfectly.

jonas.content: Nexus AI Analyst just flagged a massive divergence in the DXY. Anyone else catching the gold breakout?

footer.description: Dedicated to institutional-grade trading education. Powered by AI, driven by results. Master the markets, master yourself.
footer.rights: © 2026 AI Trading Academy. All Rights Reserved.

hero.label: Finademica.com – Recruitment Hub
hero.headline: Skip the lecture. Start the trade. Join Finademica.
hero.subheadline: We are looking for ambitious high school graduates. Master world-class trading and the art of professional communication with top-tier clients. Your success is your degree.

items.title: The Real Academy
items.desc: Forget textbooks. We teach you real-market mechanics and the high-stakes psychology of sales from day one.

items.title: High-Level Communication
items.desc: You are the face of the firm. Learn how to negotiate, persuade, and build lasting relations with high-net-worth individuals.

items.title: Uncapped Potential
items.desc: No salary ceilings. Your income scales with your analytical rigor and your ability to close deals.

analysis.title: 50% Analysis & Strategy
analysis.desc: Monitoring news wires and charts to find trade setups in crypto, gold, and equity markets.

communication.title: 50% Communication & Sales
communication.desc: Being active on the phone, engaging with clients, and pitching your market views. Closing the deal.

steps.title: Junior Position
steps.desc: Junior position under a mentor, building your own client portfolio.

steps.title: Senior Trader
steps.desc: Senior Trader status, managing large volumes or leading your own desk.

form.title: Start Your Journey
form.desc: Fill out the form below and our recruitment team will reach out shortly.
